items.title: Chronic Diseases Require Modern Insurance Solutions — Dr K. Thiruchelvam
items.summary: A recent survey by the Psoriasis Association of Malaysia highlights structural gaps between existing insurance products and the realities of chronic disease care. The post Chronic Diseases Require Modern Insurance Solutions — Dr K. Thiruchelvam appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Eight Months After Act 852, Experts Still Can’t Tell If Smoking And Vaping Behaviours Are Changing
items.summary: Experts say Malaysia lacks the data to assess Act 852’s impact eight months after rollout. Early signs include more consistent messaging that vaping is harmful and reduced product visibility, but concerns remain over youth uptake and enforcement loopholes. The post Eight Months After Act 852, Experts Still Can’t Tell If Smoking And Vaping Behaviours Are Changing appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Budget Cuts, Health Care Struggles, Election Costs: Are We Prioritising Correctly? — Medical Officer
items.summary: One can't help but wonder if RM200 million in potential election-related expenditure could instead be utilised to improve health care facilities, replace ageing medical equipment, expand digital health infrastructure, or recruit more health care workers. The post Budget Cuts, Health Care Struggles, Election Costs: Are We Prioritising Correctly? — Medical Officer appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: When Birds Enter The Ward: Infection Control Breach Or Broken Boundaries Of Care? — June Joseph
items.summary: Infection control does not solely encompass clinical procedures such as hand hygiene, but also depends on a controlled physical environment. The post When Birds Enter The Ward: Infection Control Breach Or Broken Boundaries Of Care? — June Joseph appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Severe Doctor Shortage At HoSHAS — Medical Officer
items.summary: What is often not seen is what health care workers are doing before those calls arrive. Some are actively resuscitating critically ill patients. Others are still completing ward rounds, managing admissions, reviewing deteriorating patients, admin work etc. The post Severe Doctor Shortage At HoSHAS — Medical Officer appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: CodeBlue’s View: Budget Cuts Sound Death Knell For Malaysia’s Health Care System
items.summary: Budget cuts mark the point of no return for our health care system. We will likely see more closures or disruptions of services that can no longer be prevented by "gali lubang tutup lubang". The government must choose health care over fuel subsidies. The post CodeBlue’s View: Budget Cuts Sound Death Knell For Malaysia’s Health Care System appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Don’t Be Embarrassed To Use A Walking Stick — Dr Amar-Singh HSS & Dr Lim Swee Im
items.summary: The rate of older Malaysians ageing well is poor. Let us all encourage each other to live our lives with better quality. The post Don’t Be Embarrassed To Use A Walking Stick — Dr Amar-Singh HSS & Dr Lim Swee Im appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Doctor Shortage Forces ‘Drastic Restructuring’ Of Ipoh GH’s Cardiology Service
items.summary: HRPB's cardiology service is undergoing a temporary "drastic restructuring" amid staff shortages, including one-year appointments for all referrals to the cardiology clinic, except pregnant patients. The restructuring affects both inpatient and outpatient. The post Doctor Shortage Forces ‘Drastic Restructuring’ Of Ipoh GH’s Cardiology Service appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Withdraw MOH Austerity Directive, Fill Health Care Vacancies — Rajiv Rishyakaran
items.summary: Instead of freezing recruitment, MOF and MOH must move in the exact opposite direction. The ministries need to mandate and fund all necessary measures to aggressively fill every doctor and nurse vacancy across the country as a matter of national urgency. The post Withdraw MOH Austerity Directive, Fill Health Care Vacancies — Rajiv Rishyakaran appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Metagenomic Sequencing: The Diagnostic Leap Malaysia Must Take To Combat Superbugs And The Next Pandemic — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Prof Azizi Haji Omar & Dr Nur Abdul Karim
items.summary: It is time for Malaysia's health care sector to look to the UK and adopt metagenomic sequencing as a national standard. The post Metagenomic Sequencing: The Diagnostic Leap Malaysia Must Take To Combat Superbugs And The Next Pandemic — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Prof Azizi Haji Omar & Dr Nur Abdul Karim appeared first on CodeBlue .
